mapper.insert: /* Biz: scm.AiAgentMenuEproDAO.upsertSnapshot */ INSERT INTO T_AI_AGENT_MENU_SNAPSHOT (SECTION_CD, MENU_JSON, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{sectionCd}, #{menuJson}, NOW(3)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE MENU_JSON = VALUES(MENU_JSON), UPDATED_AT = VALUES(UPDATED_AT)

/* Biz: scm.AiAgentMenuEproDAO.insertEvent */ INSERT INTO T_AI_AGENT_MENU_EVENT ( SECTION_CD, EVENT_TYP, MODULE_ID, LINK_ID, OLD_JSON, NEW_JSON, ACTOR_ID, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sectionCd}, #{eventTyp}, #{moduleId}, #{linkId}, #{oldJson}, #{newJson}, #{actorId}, NOW(3) )
mapper.select:
/* Biz: scm.AiAgentMenuEproDAO.selectEventList */ SELECT EVENT_SEQ AS eventSeq, SECTION_CD AS sectionCd, EVENT_TYP AS eventTyp, MODULE_ID AS moduleId, LINK_ID AS linkId, OLD_JSON AS oldJson, NEW_JSON AS newJson, ACTOR_ID AS actorId, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM T_AI_AGENT_MENU_EVENT WHERE SECTION_CD = #{sectionCd} ORDER BY EVENT_SEQ DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
